project: Startup PM Tool with Auto-Generated Reports

stories.title: Phase 0 Scaffolding — project boots and tests run
acceptanceCriteria: package.json contains prisma, next-auth@5.0.0-beta.25, @auth/prisma-adapter, react-hook-form, zod, luxon, @upstash/ratelimit, @anthropic-ai/sdk
prisma/schema.prisma exists with Team, User, Account, VerificationToken, Invite, Project, Task, TaskStatusEvent, WeeklyUpdate, StakeholderReport, LlmUsage models
src/lib/db-raw.ts exports dbRaw PrismaClient singleton
src/lib/db.ts exports createScopedDb(teamId) using Prisma $extends (not Proxy)
src/lib/time.ts exports weeklyPeriod(team, now) using luxon
docker-compose.yml exists with postgres, mailpit, redis services
.env.example exists with DATABASE_URL, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CRON_SECRET, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL
vercel.json exists with Monday 09:00 UTC cron for /api/cron/weekly-updates
vitest.config.ts exists
pnpm test exits 0 (empty suite is fine)
pnpm build exits 0

stories.title: Phase 1 — Auth: NextAuth v5 JWT sessions with signup + login
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/auth.ts exists with session: { strategy: 'jwt' } and PrismaAdapter for User/Account/VerificationToken only (no Session model)
src/lib/auth.ts jwt callback stamps token.teamId and token.role from user record
src/lib/auth.ts session callback exposes session.user.teamId and session.user.role
src/lib/auth-session.ts exports requireSession() that reads from auth() and returns { userId, teamId, role } or redirects to /login
app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts exists and exports GET, POST from NextAuth handlers
app/(auth)/login/page.tsx exists with email+password form and magic-link option
app/(auth)/signup/page.tsx exists and on submit creates Team (slug derived from name) + User(role=ADMIN) + sends magic link
middleware.ts gates /app/* behind auth check and redirects unauthenticated users to /login

stories.title: Phase 1 — Multi-tenancy: $extends scoping + invite flow
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/db.ts createScopedDb covers findMany/findUnique/findFirst/create/createMany/update/updateMany/upsert/delete/deleteMany for all domain models
Cross-tenant create throws 'Cross-tenant write rejected' error when data.teamId !== session.teamId
task.update in $extends emits TaskStatusEvent row when status changes
src/server/teams/invite-member.ts creates Invite row with 24hr expiry and emails the invite link
app/api/invites/accept/route.ts accepts invite token, creates User scoped to team, marks Invite.acceptedAt
app/(app)/settings/team/page.tsx shows team name, timezone picker, member list, and invite form

stories.title: Phase 2 — Projects + Tasks CRUD (AC1 + AC2)
acceptanceCriteria: app/(app)/projects/page.tsx lists all team projects
app/(app)/projects/new/page.tsx creates a project (name, description, deadline) scoped to team
app/(app)/projects/[projectId]/page.tsx shows project detail with inline task table
Task create/edit dialogs support title, description, assignee (team member dropdown), dueDate, status, and blockedReason (visible when status=BLOCKED)
Task status changes emit TaskStatusEvent via $extends layer (completedAt set when status→DONE)
Empty state on project list coaches: 'Create your first project to get a weekly update next Monday'
pnpm build exits 0 with the CRUD pages added

stories.title: Phase 3 — Report Engine: collectTaskFacts + generators (AC3 + AC5)
acceptanceCriteria: src/server/reports/collect-task-facts.ts exports collectTaskFacts(teamId, start, end) returning TaskFacts with completed/inProgress/blocked/overdue/slippedThisWeek/upcoming/byProject/byAssignee/statusTransitions

src/server/reports/weekly-generator.ts exports generateWeeklyUpdate(facts) returning WeeklyUpdateContent with highlights, completed, inProgress, blocked, upcoming, narrative — identical structured sections for identical inputs

src/server/reports/stakeholder-generator.ts exports generateStakeholderReport(facts, scope) with ExecutiveSummary, ProgressSinceLast, KeyDeliverables, Risks (includes blockedReason), NextMilestones sections
src/server/reports/narrative-polish.ts exports polishNarrative(raw, facts, teamId) that calls Anthropic claude-haiku-4-5, tracks LlmUsage, falls back to raw on error/budget-exhausted/timeout
app/api/cron/weekly-updates/route.ts uses Promise.allSettled over teams, idempotent upsert on (teamId, periodStart), returns HTTP 200 even on partial failures
app/api/reports/stakeholder/generate/route.ts creates StakeholderReport with 30-day shareTokenExpiresAt and handles P2002 concurrent-generation race
app/(app)/reports/weekly/page.tsx lists weekly updates with narrative + 'AI-assisted' footer when usedLlm=true
app/(app)/reports/stakeholder/page.tsx has Generate button and lists past reports with Copy Share Link
app/share/[token]/page.tsx renders report publicly, checks expiry/revocation, returns X-Robots-Tag: noindex nofollow

stories.title: Phase 4 — Export formats + Sentry + polish (AC4 + AC6)
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/reports/stakeholder/[id]/export/route.ts supports ?format=md returning markdown download
app/api/reports/stakeholder/[id]/export/route.ts supports ?format=pdf returning PDF via @react-pdf/renderer
Landing page at app/(marketing)/page.tsx has clear value proposition copy
All primary flows have empty-state coaching text (no blank pages)
pnpm build exits 0 with all phases complete
Sentry is initialized via @sentry/nextjs (sentry.client.config.ts and sentry.server.config.ts exist)

stories.title: Tests: unit tests for core report engine invariants
acceptanceCriteria: tests/unit/time/period-boundaries.test.ts exists and passes: weeklyPeriod in America/Los_Angeles produces correct UTC instants around DST spring-forward
tests/unit/reports/weekly-generator.test.ts exists and passes: empty week, happy week, blocked week fixture cases produce non-empty structured output
tests/unit/reports/collect-task-facts.test.ts exists and passes: boundary case (task completed exactly at periodEnd) is classified as completed
tests/unit/tenant/scoping.test.ts exists and passes: createScopedDb rejects cross-tenant writes
pnpm test exits 0 with all unit tests passing
